mode.description: Mode: 'investigate' for targeted AI analysis, 'workflow' for predefined SOC workflows.

file_path.description: Path to the log file to investigate.

search_term.description: Term to investigate (IP, user, error, etc.). Required for investigate mode.

workflow_type.description: Predefined SOC workflow to execute. Required for workflow mode.

target.description: Specific target for targeted workflows (e.g. IP for investigate_ip).

context_lines.description: Max matching lines to analyze in investigate mode.

full_log.description: If true, scan entire file. Otherwise stop after context_lines matches.
